display.name: Geiss - Cauldron (painterly)
display.author: Geiss
display.blurb: Boiling brushstrokes in warm oils — paint stirred by audio energy.

annotation.technical_notes: A custom wave draws a highly reactive, jittering line driven by treble frequencies, while a low decay rate in sampler_main feedback creates a sweeping, ribbon-like extrusion across the dark canvas. The spatial displacement in the feedback loop translates the previous frame, forming a pseudo-3D trail that tracks the wave's motion. Color cycles dynamically, mapping a shifting palette across the extruded ribbon.
